T1_gromov_delta.description: Gromov delta-hyperbolicity on anchor k-NN tangent space

controls.name: random_gaussian_null
controls.note: true null, 2.3x lower than real embeddings

T1_gromov_delta.interpretation: BGE-M3 embeddings have genuine hyperbolic structure (2.3x above null baseline). Anchor kNN ~0.078, consistently STRONG across all 4 subsystems.

T5_expmap_distortion.description: Spearman correlation: Euclidean tangent distance vs hyperbolic distance after Lorentz lift
T5_expmap_distortion.interpretation: Lorentz lift (tau=3, k=64) preserves pairwise distance ordering with rho=0.997. Pipeline is geometrically stable.

decision: A1 CONFIRMED — Version A Lorentz pipeline viable. Proceed to LKHJB + hierarchy oracle.
next: LKHJB 200 pairs (LKHJB benchmark), then LLM hierarchy oracle evaluation
